Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I pray at the Inari shrine?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sense something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What is it? Did you want a card?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All right, I'll copy it for you. It's one of my hobbies these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Choose a Skill Card that's to your liking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's hard to choose just one if you have a bunch, so it's best to use them up. That way, you're carrying fewer of them around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Shall we do this, then?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Hey, you don't have anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't copy any Skill Cards for you if you don't have any in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What kind of Skill Card do you want duplicated?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh? Did you change your mind?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All right then— Wait a second, you can't hold any more of that card.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Pick a different one, will you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You've already duplicated a card today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nobody likes pushy people... Besides, I'm tired.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you certain you want to duplicate the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0} card?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Well, here goes![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Whew, all done. Go on, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}See you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Some visitors left Inari sushi as an offering.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tried to put my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]to good use by thinking of a way[n]to get my hands on some.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What's with the sullen look on your face? Did something bad happen?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A boy your age should be happy and carefree...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What you need is a good meal and some rest, and you'll feel better![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Here, have some Inari sushi...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I obtained some {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You have to be optimistic! Your generation is Japan's future![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's some Inari sushi at the shrine, but[n]I can't just steal someone's offerings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should work on my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}.[n]If I were at least {f 4 31 0 5 1 0}, maybe[n]I could think of another solution...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth said[n]that she wanted to try sushi...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Inari shrine is quiet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, I see you're back. Well then, go on and pick which card you'd like to duplicate.[n]{f 1 1}
